lines.english: How was the plane able to clear the mountains?
lines.chinese: 飞机是如何能够越过山脉的？
lines.raw: How was the plane able to clear the mountains? | 飞机是如何能够越过山脉的？

lines.english: In 1929, three years after his flight over the North Pole,
lines.raw: In 1929, three years after his flight over the North Pole, | 1929年，在他飞越北极三年后，
the American explorer, R.E. Byrd, | 美国探险家R.E.伯德，

lines.english: successfully flew over the South Pole for the first time.
lines.raw: successfully flew over the South Pole for the first time. | 首次成功飞越了南极。

lines.english: Though, at first, Byrd and his men were able to take a
lines.chinese: 虽然起初，伯德和他的队员们能够拍摄到
lines.raw: Though, at first, Byrd and his men were able to take a | 虽然起初，伯德和他的队员们能够拍摄到

lines.english: great many photographs of the mountains that lay below,
lines.raw: great many photographs of the mountains that lay below, | 许多下方山脉的照片，

lines.english: they soon ran into serious trouble.
lines.chinese: 但他们很快就遇到了严重的麻烦。
lines.raw: they soon ran into serious trouble. | 但他们很快就遇到了严重的麻烦。

lines.english: At one point, it seemed certain that their plane would crash.
lines.chinese: 有一刻，他们的飞机似乎肯定会坠毁。
lines.raw: At one point, it seemed certain that their plane would crash. | 有一刻，他们的飞机似乎肯定会坠毁。

lines.english: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10, 000 feet.
lines.chinese: 只有当飞机上升到10,000英尺时，才能越过山脉。
lines.raw: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10, 000 feet. | 只有当飞机上升到10,000英尺时，才能越过山脉。

lines.english: Byrd at once ordered his men to throw out two heavy food sacks.
lines.chinese: 伯德立即命令他的队员们扔掉两个沉重的食物袋。
lines.raw: Byrd at once ordered his men to throw out two heavy food sacks. | 伯德立即命令他的队员们扔掉两个沉重的食物袋。

lines.english: The plane was then able to rise and it cleared the mountains by 400 feet.
lines.chinese: 飞机随后得以升高，并以400英尺的高度越过了山脉。
lines.raw: The plane was then able to rise and it cleared the mountains by 400 feet. | 飞机随后得以升高，并以400英尺的高度越过了山脉。

lines.english: Byrd now knew that he would be able to reach the South Pole which was 300 miles away,
lines.chinese: 伯德现在知道他将能够抵达300英里外的南极，
lines.raw: Byrd now knew that he would be able to reach the South Pole which was 300 miles away, | 伯德现在知道他将能够抵达300英里外的南极，

lines.english: for there were no more mountains in sight.
lines.chinese: 因为视线中没有更多的山脉了。
lines.raw: for there were no more mountains in sight. | 因为视线中没有更多的山脉了。

lines.english: The aircraft was able to fly over the endless white plains without difficulty.
lines.chinese: 飞机能够毫不费力地飞越无尽的白色平原。
lines.raw: The aircraft was able to fly over the endless white plains without difficulty. | 飞机能够毫不费力地飞越无尽的白色平原。
